page: Hetzner Cloud cx23 is an entry-level virtual server belonging to the cx family, running on the QEMU hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon CPU with 2 shared vCPUs and 2 physical cores operating at 2.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 4.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 1.95 GB of memory per core. Local storage is provided by a 40 GB SSD, and the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark evaluations indicate that the cx23 is positioned in the lower performance tiers. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance score is 1028.88, while the multi-core score is 2016.78, placing it in the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block speed of 149.36 GB/sec and a large block write speed of 16.93 GB/sec. In application-specific tests, the server achieved a static web serving throughput of 1.77 GB/sec and processed 2.52 million Redis SET operations per second.

Given its shared CPU allocation and modest resource footprint, the cx23 offers a highly cost-efficient profile for workloads that do not require sustained high-performance compute. It is suitable for lightweight, non-critical applications such as basic web serving, development environments, small-scale testing, and low-traffic database operations. It is not recommended for intensive multi-threaded processing, large-scale data compilation, or complex machine learning tasks.
description: Hetzner Cloud cx23 is an entry-level virtual server built on the QEMU hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features an Intel Xeon CPU with 2 shared vCPUs, 2 physical cores running at 2.0 GHz, and 4.0 GB of RAM. Storage is supported by a local 40 GB SSD, with no bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower tiers, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1028.88 and a multi-core score of 2016.78. Memory bandwidth is limited, reaching 20.91 GB/sec for large block reads. Given its shared CPU model and modest hardware profile, the cx23 is a cost-effective option for low-demand workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, lightweight development environments, small-scale testing, and simple background tasks.
og_description: Hetzner Cloud cx23 is an entry-level virtual server featuring 2 shared Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and a 40 GB local SSD, designed for lightweight workloads and cost-sensitive development environments.
meta_description: Hetzner Cloud cx23 is an entry-level virtual server featuring 2 shared Intel Xeon vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and a 40 GB local SSD for basic workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server with shared Intel Xeon processors and local SSD storage for lightweight applications and testing environments.

4.0 GB of system memory and 40 GB of local SSD storage
Shared CPU allocation optimized for cost-sensitive deployments
Suited for lightweight web serving and development environments
